title: Download-logs skill and TODO audit
notes:
- feat: taris-download-logs skill added (.github/skills/taris-download-logs/SKILL.md)
- feat: skill covers all 5 log categories (main, assistant, security, voice, datastore) for all 4 targets (ts2, ts1, pi2, pi1)
- fix: TODO §6.1 download-logs item marked done
- docs: copilot-instructions.md skills table updated

title: Fix Postgres RAG crash when pgvector unavailable
notes:
- fix: vec_embeddings table DDL no longer includes embedding vector(384) column (pgvector dependency removed from base schema)
- fix: embedding column and HNSW index added via conditional ALTER TABLE migration only when pgvector is available
- fix: upsert_chunk_text and search_fts now work on all Postgres deployments regardless of pgvector status
- fix: load_system_docs.py --force no longer crashes with UndefinedTable on pgvector-less deployments

title: MCP admin UI and TODO cleanup
notes:
- feat: Admin -> RAG -> Remote MCP: configure URL/token/timeout/top_k at runtime without restart
- feat: bot_mcp_client reads MCP config from system_settings DB first (env fallback)
- fix: TODO §19.4 all items marked done (migration script, pgvector HNSW, visible_variants already implemented)
- fix: TODO §25.6 Phase B sqlite-vec marked done; Phase C MCP admin UI done
- docs: §27 Multimodal RAG added as separate future topic (CLIP, docling, vision API, per-user ACL)

changes: fix: [BOT CAPABILITIES] tag no longer reproduced literally in LLM replies — security preamble now instructs LLM to enumerate capabilities in plain text
fix: admin guide (howto_admin.md) now stored as is_shared=2 (admin-only RAG); user guide remains is_shared=1 (all users)
feat: RAG retrieval (FTS5 + vector) passes is_admin flag so admin-only docs are returned only for admin users
fix: load_system_docs.py re-run required with --force to apply new is_shared=2 level for existing admin guide entries
feat: system chat host context now includes network interfaces, default gateway, and available speed/diagnostic tools
Net ifaces: active UP interfaces with default iface+gateway; Speed tools: speedtest-cli/iperf3/nload/etc if installed, otherwise /proc/net/dev + curl fallbacks
feat: system chat now injects host OS/HW context into LLM system prompt
Host context includes: hostname, OS distro+version, kernel, arch, CPU model, RAM, disk, init system, package manager, temperature tools (lm-sensors/vcgencmd/thermal_zone), available admin tools
Commands now adapted to the actual host (e.g. 'sensors' for x86 temperature, correct pkg manager)
fix: system chat no-command bug — ollama timeout now respects 45s limit (no OLLAMA_MIN_TIMEOUT override for system use_case)
fix: per-func LLM override fallback chain — when per-func provider fails and LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER matches it, global LLM_PROVIDER is now tried as final cloud fallback
test: T109 — two sub-tests for system chat ollama timeout guard and global default fallback
fix: ask_llm_with_history now tries LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER (ollama) before legacy llama.cpp fallback — eliminates 'connection refused' error when primary LLM fails
fix: list_active_chat_ids uses row['chat_id'] (dict_row compat)
test: T108 regression test for named fallback in ask_llm_with_history
Fix: store_postgres.py used positional row[0] with dict_row pool — raised KeyError every call
Fix: chat history (append_history_tracked) now correctly stores to Postgres — row['id'] fix
Fix: LLM no-history fallback preserves system prompt — system chat now returns bash cmd even after LLM history call failure
Fix: bot_llm.py ask_llm_with_history no-history fallback uses ask_llm_with_history (not ask_llm) to preserve use_case
T107: regression test for Postgres dict_row named column access
OpenClaw variant: SQLite fully eliminated — Postgres is the only data store
bot_access.py: _notes_context/_contacts_context SQLite fallbacks removed
telegram_menu_bot.py: init_db() guarded — only runs on non-Postgres (PicoClaw) variant
bot_db.py: db_save_voice_opts/db_get_voice_opts delegate to store on Postgres
bot_calendar.py: _cal_save() uses store.load_events() instead of get_db()
bot_users.py: _load_note_text/_save_note_file use store API only
Migration script: src/setup/migrate_sqlite_to_postgres.py — idempotent SQLite→Postgres
Data migration: 316 rows migrated from SQLite to Postgres (users, calendar, history, notes, prefs, etc.)
T106: regression test for no-SQLite-fallbacks on Postgres variant
All user data migrated to DB (Postgres on OpenClaw, SQLite on PicoClaw)
web_accounts, web_reset_tokens, web_link_codes tables in both backends
bot_auth.py: accounts and reset tokens now DB-backed; auto-migrates accounts.json on first run
bot_state.py: Telegram link codes now stored in DB (web_link_codes table)
bot_mail_creds.py: store.get_mail_creds() is now primary; file is migration fallback
bot_web.py: _load_mail_creds_for_user uses DB via store
T103-T105: regression tests for web_accounts store methods, system_settings JSON, mail_creds store primary

title: Fix: notes stored to wrong path on Postgres (str(chat_id) vs UUID dir); note content recovered
notes:
- store_postgres.py: save_note/load_note/delete_note used os.path.join(NOTES_DIR, str(chat_id)) — ignoring UUID account linking. For users linked to a web account, notes were written/read from the wrong directory.
- Fix: added _notes_storage_dir(chat_id) static method that reads accounts.json and resolves to the correct UUID path (mirrors _resolve_storage_id in bot_users.py).
- Data recovery: orphaned notes from earlier sessions (u-a9d8b5df, u-f55429b7) migrated to the current user's UUID directory (u-21323d0f). Content and SQLite index restored.
- Regression test T102 (store_postgres_notes_uuid_path) added

title: Fix: clicking notes crashes with 'text must be non-empty' for empty note files
notes:
- bot_handlers.py: _handle_note_open() passed empty note_content when .md file is 0 bytes — widget text became '\n' which Telegram rejects as empty. Fix: use note_empty_body placeholder when text.strip() is falsy (same pattern as _handle_note_raw)
- render_telegram.py: added screen_path parameter to render_screen() for better error diagnostics in logs
- Regression test T101 (note_open_empty_file) added

title: Fix: document detail card broken on Postgres (created_at datetime crash)
notes:
- bot_documents.py: _handle_doc_detail() crashed silently when Postgres returned created_at as datetime.datetime — raw [:16] slice is not valid on datetime objects
- Fix: detect datetime with hasattr(x, 'strftime') and format to string before slicing; fallback to str()[:16] for SQLite ISO strings
- Also wrapped lines-build in try/except with proper error logging to prevent future silent failures
- Regression test T100 (doc_detail_datetime_safe) added

title: Fix: empty note render crash + voice admin info Markdown injection
notes:
- render_telegram.py: empty/whitespace MarkdownBlock text replaced with zero-width space to prevent Telegram 400 'text must be non-empty' error when viewing empty notes
- bot_voice.py: wrap STT/LLM/TTS labels in backticks in _send_admin_info() to prevent Markdown entity injection from model names with underscores (e.g. ru_RU-dmitri-medium.onnx)
- Regression tests T98 (render_telegram_empty_block) and T99 (admin_info_markdown_safe) added

title: Rename PicoClaw to Taris; add configurable male TTS voice per user
notes:
- Renamed all user-facing 'PicoClaw'/'picoclaw' references to 'Taris' (display, config defaults, admin panel, bot_ui.py, voice_assistant.py, screen.schema.json)
- Added male TTS voice option: ru_RU-dmitri-medium.onnx (Dmitri) alongside existing female Irina
- voice_male preference stored per-user in voice_opts DB table (new column)
- Telegram Profile screen: voice gender toggle button
- Web UI Profile page: voice gender radio selector card
- Admin voice opts menu: global voice_male default toggle
- _piper_model_path() selects model per user; falls back to female if male model absent
- DB migration: ALTER TABLE voice_opts ADD COLUMN voice_male INTEGER DEFAULT 0 (idempotent)
- Backward compat: DEVICE_VARIANT=picoclaw in existing Pi bot.env still accepted (normalized to 'taris')

title: Fix STT speech_pad_ms regression on TariStation2 — make configurable
notes:
- Root cause: speech_pad_ms=200 was hardcoded in bot_voice.py VAD parameters (up from faster-whisper default 30ms); added ~170ms extra delay after end-of-speech on TariStation2
- Fix: FASTER_WHISPER_SPEECH_PAD_MS env var (default 30ms = original behavior); SintAItion sets FASTER_WHISPER_SPEECH_PAD_MS=200 in bot.env to keep trailing-word accuracy improvement
- TariStation2: no bot.env change needed (default 30ms restored)

title: Fix voice LLM silently using Ollama when chat per-function override is set
notes:
- Root cause: ask_llm_with_history() called without use_case= so defaulted to 'chat'; per_func['chat']='ollama' on SintAItion caused every voice call to use slow Ollama (12-15s) while log showed 'provider=openai' (misleading)
- Fix: pass use_case='voice' to ask_llm_with_history in bot_voice.py so per_func['voice'] is checked (empty = falls back to LLM_PROVIDER=openai)
- Fix: log now shows actual resolved provider (not LLM_PROVIDER constant) so mismatch is immediately visible

title: Fix LLM silent fallback to Ollama caused by invalid model name in active_model.txt
notes:
- Root cause: active_model.txt contained 'openai/gpt-4.1-mini' (invalid for OpenAI API) causing HTTP 400 and silent fallback to slow Ollama
- Fix: reset active_model.txt to 'gpt-4o-mini' on SintAItion
- get_active_model() now strips provider prefixes (e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o-mini' -> 'gpt-4o-mini') to prevent recurrence
- Improved HTTP error logging: shows model name on 4xx errors so root cause is visible immediately

title: SintAItion: switch LLM primary to OpenAI (gpt-4o-mini), Ollama as fallback
notes:
- SintAItion LLM_PROVIDER=openai (gpt-4o-mini) — was ollama (qwen3.5:9B)
- LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER=ollama — local Ollama used when OpenAI unavailable
- Result: LLM 14.3s -> 0.46s (31x faster); total voice pipeline expected ~3-4s vs 16.7s
- Quality improved: gpt-4o-mini > qwen3.5:9B for multilingual responses
- Ollama stays running for fallback and direct testing

title: Perf: embedding pre-warm + fastembed ONNX + history cap
notes:
- Pre-warm EmbeddingService at startup (background thread) — eliminates 2s cold-start delay on first chat/RAG call
- fastembed ONNX model downloaded on SintAItion — 5x faster embedding inference vs sentence-transformers
- CONVERSATION_HISTORY_MAX=8 on SintAItion (was 15) — reduces Ollama prefill tokens, saving ~7s per LLM call
- Analysis: voice LLM was 20.4s (history=15 + personal context > 3000 tokens); now expected ~12s

title: STT optimizations: thread cap fix, timestamps off, VAD tuning
notes:
- Fix: FASTER_WHISPER_THREADS explicit value no longer capped at 8 (only auto-detect is capped)
- Perf: without_timestamps=True in transcribe() — skips unused timestamp computation
- Perf: VAD speech_pad_ms=200 (was default 400ms) — less silence padding around speech
- Result: STT 12+ threads now active on SintAItion (was silently using 8 despite =12 in bot.env)

title: Full performance stack: streaming chat, keep_alive, token cap, system tuning
notes:
- Perf: streaming LLM responses in Telegram chat (edits message every 1.5s, first text visible within 1-2s)
- Perf: keep_alive passed in Ollama API body — model stays in VRAM 24h regardless of service setting
- Perf: LOCAL_MAX_TOKENS=256 on SintAItion (was 512 default; cuts worst-case from 42s to 21s)
- Perf: vm.swappiness=10 on SintAItion (reduces swap micro-stalls)
- Perf: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=1 + OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1 explicit in service
- Perf: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=24h in service (overrides default 1h)
- Add: ask_llm_stream() generator in bot_llm.py for incremental response delivery
- Add: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE config constant in bot_config.py

title: SintAItion LLM and STT performance tuning
notes:
- Perf: OLLAMA_NUM_CTX env var caps KV cache context window (default: model max 256K, now configurable)
- Perf: num_ctx passed to Ollama /api/chat options in both single-turn and multi-turn calls
- Perf: power profile set to performance on SintAItion (was balanced at 48% CPU clock)
- Perf: OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE=q8_0 halves VRAM usage for KV cache
- Perf: FASTER_WHISPER_THREADS=12 on SintAItion (up from 8, 24-core machine)
- Config: OLLAMA_NUM_CTX added to bot_config.py with default 0 (use model default)

title: Multilingual STT: auto-detect language in faster-whisper
notes:
- Add: STT now auto-detects spoken language when STT_LANG is unset (Russian, German, English, Slovenian + 90 other languages)
- Add: 'sl' (Slovenian) added to faster-whisper lang_map
- Fix: fallback for unknown lang codes changed from forced 'ru' to None (auto-detect)
- Config: STT_LANG=ru commented out in bot.env on TariStation2 and in bot.env.example
- No code change needed for SintAItion — set STT_LANG= (empty) in bot.env there to enable

title: Personal data context injection in LLM conversations
notes:
- Fix: calendar events, notes, and contacts were stored in DB but never shown to the LLM during chat — bot was answering 'I have no access'
- Add: _calendar_context() injects upcoming events (next 14 days) into every system message
- Add: _notes_context() injects note titles and content snippets (up to 10 notes, 200 chars each)
- Add: _contacts_context() injects full contact list (name, phone, email, notes) into every system message
- All three blocks are appended to _build_system_message() before language instruction
- Functions are safe: return empty string on any error or when user has no data
- Test: T97 personal_context_injection — verifies all three functions defined and wired into _build_system_message

- Fix: FASTER_WHISPER_PRELOAD=0 added to TariStation2 bot.env — disables 460MB model preload at startup, freeing RAM and eliminating swap-induced callback stalls (menu was freezing 30-100s)
- Fix: tail_log() rewrote to use subprocess tail instead of f.readlines() — avoids loading full 7.5MB log file into RAM on admin_logs_show
- Add: FASTER_WHISPER_PRELOAD env var in bot_config.py (default 1, set 0 on low-memory machines)
- Add: startup memory check via /proc/meminfo — logs WARNING if available RAM < 512MB or swap > 80%
- Test: T94 FASTER_WHISPER_PRELOAD config, T95 tail_log no readlines, T96 startup memory check

changes: fix: ReadTimeout/ConnectionError from stale API connections now suppressed in exception handler — prevents exponential polling backoff when a send_message call times out on a dead connection
fix: API READ_TIMEOUT reduced 30s→10s — limits how long a stale connection hangs before failing
fix: TCP keepalive on Telegram API HTTP session — prevents Fritz!Box IPv6 stateful firewall from dropping idle connections (was: stale connections caused 48s+ menu response hangs)

fix: answer_callback_query wrapped in try/except — stale callbacks (>60s) no longer crash the polling worker pool and trigger exponential backoff (was: each expired callback doubled poll interval up to 60s, making bot appear frozen)
fix: TimeoutStopSec increased 30s→60s — bot now stops gracefully without SIGKILL on restart (was: SIGKILL every restart due to 25s long-poll completing after 30s timeout)
perf: increased TeleBot num_threads 2→16 — prevents menu callbacks queuing behind slow LLM/voice handlers (was: 1 LLM call blocks ALL menus for up to 60s)
perf: chat, system-chat and voice message handlers now dispatch to daemon threads — telebot worker thread freed immediately, menus always responsive
perf: added [PERF] timing logs in callback_handler — slow callbacks (>500ms) logged as WARNING, answer_callback_query delays (>300ms) flagged
perf: send_chat_action(typing) sent before dispatching LLM/voice work — user sees immediate feedback
fix: PostgreSQL store now includes shared system documents (chat_id=0) in all RAG searches — user/admin guides were invisible to all users on PostgreSQL backends
fix: get_chunks_without_embeddings in PostgreSQL store now queries vec_embeddings table (removed broken doc_chunks reference)
fix: system documents (user guide, admin guide) re-indexed with full embeddings on TariStation2
feat: Ollama model updated to qwen3.5:0.8b on TariStation2 for better local LLM fallback quality
feat: system chat now has conversation memory — follow-up requests like 'add --user flag' refer back to previous commands
fix: system chat history is kept separate from user chat history (in-memory, not written to DB)
fix: system history clears on menu exit for a fresh start next session
fix: admin log view now shows newest lines first — most recent entry visible without scrolling
fix: infinity_polling logger_level=DEBUG — suppress ReadTimeout spam in journal (SintAItion flaky network)
fix: outer while-True guard around infinity_polling for extra crash resilience
fix: timeout=25 (was 30) — recover from network drop 5s faster
fix: docs_menu_title says click-to-manage instead of click-to-delete
fix: bot self-knowledge — security preamble now explicitly instructs LLM to answer capability questions using [BOT CAPABILITIES] block
fix: voice send_voice wrapped with _tg_send_with_retry for unstable internet robustness
fix: _tg_send_with_retry upgraded to 5 retries with exponential back-off (3s/6s/12s/24s/30s)
Fix: HuggingFace contacted on every startup for model freshness checks — SentenceTransformer now uses local_files_only=True; fastembed uses persistent ~/.cache/fastembed instead of /tmp
Fix: security.log, voice.log, datastore.log, assistant.log were always empty — subsystem loggers now route to dedicated files (+ telegram_bot.log via propagation)
Refactor: bot_voice.py, bot_security.py, bot_auth.py use log_voice/log_security; bot_llm.py uses log_assistant; store/db modules use log_datastore
Fix: document detail card showed raw {title}/{chunks}/{doc_type} template strings before actual data
Fix: bot answered 'I cannot process file uploads' — added [BOT CAPABILITIES] block to system prompt so LLM knows all features
Fix: voice pipeline LLM response lost on unstable network — _tg_send_with_retry() retries 3x on connection/timeout errors; falls back to editing transcript message if all attempts fail
Fix: stale regression tests updated — profile_rag handlers moved to bot_admin.py; vector_returns_chunk_idx used wrong SQL keyword
Fix: _store_text_chunks() upsert_embedding missing chunk_text arg — vector embeddings were silently never stored
Fix: search_fts() and search_similar() now return chunk_idx — RRF fusion was collapsing all chunks to idx=0
Fix: shared documents (is_shared=1) now included in FTS and vector search for all users
Enhancement: retrieve_context() returns 4-tuple with trace dict (n_fts5, n_vector, n_mcp, latency_ms)
Enhancement: rag_log table gains n_fts5/n_vector/n_mcp columns via auto-migration; log_rag_activity logs component counts
Enhancement: RAG log now shows INFO-level per-query strategy breakdown (fts5/vector/mcp chunk counts)
New: src/setup/load_system_docs.py — loads README + howto_bot.md + architecture/overview.md as shared system KB (auto-loaded at startup)
New: src/setup/migrate_reembed.py — re-embeds all existing doc_chunks with no vectors (run once after deploy)
Tests T87-T90: embedding pipeline fix, shared-docs search, RAG trace fields, system docs structure

Fix: calendar LLM calls (_finish_cal_add, _handle_calendar_query, _handle_cal_console, _cal_handle_edit_input) made non-blocking — previously saturated pyTelebot 2-thread pool causing 'query is too old' crashes and menu timeouts
Phase C: chunk quality filter — fragments shorter than 20 chars are skipped; quality_pct, n_skipped, n_embedded stored in document metadata
Phase C: doc detail view now shows embedding count and chunk quality percentage
Phase D: /mcp/search REST endpoint — exposes local RAG as MCP-compatible tool (Bearer-token auth)
Phase D: bot_mcp_client.py — remote MCP RAG client with circuit breaker (3 failures → 5 min cooldown), merged into RRF pipeline
Phase D: MCP_SERVER_ENABLED, MCP_REMOTE_URL, MCP_TIMEOUT, MCP_REMOTE_TOP_K config constants
Fix: bot_embeddings.py import corrected from src.core to core — vector embeddings now work in production deploy
Tests T84-T86: upload stats completeness, embeddings import fix, MCP Phase D structure
Fix: api_benchmark blocks uvicorn event loop — LLM/TTS/STT calls now use asyncio.to_thread, eliminating HTTP 000 timeouts under load
Fix: FasterWhisper preload re-enabled for openclaw variant (DEVICE_VARIANT=openclaw) to eliminate 4s cold-start delay; CUDA RAM concern does not apply to ROCm setup
Fix: RAG hybrid mode broken — psutil missing caused FTS5_ONLY detection even on 7.6 GB machine (fix: /proc/meminfo fallback)
Fix: svc.embed([query]) wrong signature — passed list to str API, returning None (fix: svc.embed(query))
Fix: search_similar missing chunk_idx in SELECT — RRF fusion collapsed all doc chunks to single entry (fix: added chunk_idx to SELECT)
Result: Russian queries now retrieve 3 relevant chunks from English/German documents via cross-lingual vector search
Test: T80 regression test added (4 checks)
title: RAG hybrid retrieval — 3 root causes fixed
notes:
- Fixed: psutil missing → RAM detection fell back to 0 GB → HYBRID strategy never activated; now uses /proc/meminfo fallback
- Fixed: embed() called with list arg instead of string → vector search returned empty results for all queries
- Fixed: search_similar() SELECT missing chunk_idx column → RRF fusion collapsed all chunks to 1 result
- After fixes: Russian queries correctly return 3 chunks via hybrid strategy against cross-lingual documents
- Added T80 regression test (4 checks)

changes: Fix: RAG View Log crashed with no effect on Postgres targets (datetime[:16] TypeError)
Fix: str() wrap on created_at and query fields in _handle_admin_rag_log for SQLite+Postgres compat
Test: T79 regression test for RAG log datetime serialization
title: RAG View Log fix — Postgres datetime TypeError
notes:
- Fixed: _handle_admin_rag_log() crashed silently on Postgres because datetime.datetime objects are not subscriptable with [:16]
- Fix: str() wrap on created_at and query fields (works for both Postgres datetime and SQLite string)
- Added T79 regression test (3 checks)

changes: Fix: text message without active mode now routes to chat instead of showing main menu
title: Chat mode fix — second message showed main menu
notes:
- Fixed: after LLM answer, pressing Back cleared _user_mode; next text message triggered _send_menu() instead of LLM response
- Fix: mode=None on text message now defaults to chat mode instead of showing the main menu

changes: Admin menu: RAG Knowledge Base and Voice Config buttons now always visible
RAG menu: Back button now works correctly (was unhandled callback)
Tests: T73-T78 RAG and memory integration regression tests added
Bug fix: delete_embeddings called on document delete and replace
title: Admin menu RAG settings visibility fix
notes:
- Fixed: RAG Settings and Dev menu buttons missing from admin_menu.yaml → not visible in Admin panel
- Fixed: RAG back button used wrong callback_data ('admin' instead of 'admin_menu')
- Fixed: SRC_ROOT portable path in regression tests for remote Pi targets
- Admin menu now shows all sub-items correctly on first open

changes: Documents: fixed FTS search on PostgreSQL backend (plainto_tsquery + GIN index)
Admin logs: truncate long logs to fit Telegram 4096-char limit
Benchmark: concurrency lock guard prevents LLM timeout during benchmark runs
title: Multiple Postgres/OpenClaw bug fixes + UI tests
notes:
- Fixed: Documents page — FTS5 not available on Postgres; implemented Postgres FTS via plainto_tsquery + GIN index
- Fixed: system_chat command hang — Ollama socket.timeout not converted to TimeoutExpired; removed OLLAMA_MIN_TIMEOUT floor for system use_case
- Fixed: /status command showing wrong services on OpenClaw variant; now shows taris-web + ollama with --user scope
- Fixed: /contacts endpoint 500 error (page param collision in _ctx())
- Fixed: PDF upload failing on PostgresStore (missing get_document_by_hash, update_document_field, log_rag_activity, list_rag_log, rag_stats methods)
- Added T73-T78 regression tests for document admin, RAG pipeline, and memory integration
- Web UI: Settings and Contacts Playwright tests added (61 tests pass)

changes: PyMuPDF PDF extraction with image placeholders; pdfminer fallback
RAG monitoring dashboard: rag_stats(), latency_ms+query_type in rag_log, Admin > RAG Stats
Per-user RAG settings in Profile: rag_top_k, rag_chunk_size (user_prefs table)
Developer Menu (bot_dev.py): Dev Chat, Restart, Log, Last Error, Files, Security Log
RAG: classify_query() adaptive routing + RRF fusion + hardware-tier detection (bot_rag.py)
Security logging: security_events table, log_security_event(), log_access_denied()
T66-T72 regression tests for Phase B/C and User Rights
title: RAG knowledge base, Dev menu, voice debug, LLM fallback
notes:
- RAG pipeline: document upload (PDF/TXT), chunking, embedding (MiniLM), FTS5+vector hybrid retrieval, admin RAG settings, query log
- Dev menu: admin-only developer panel with LLM trace, system info, RAG stats, benchmark trigger
- Voice debug mode: per-session audio capture (7 stages), downloadable debug bundles from Web UI
- LLM named fallback: LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER env var; local Ollama fallback guard (LLM_LOCAL_FALLBACK)
- Per-user memory toggle in profile; admin Memory Settings page
- Notes/Calendar fully DB-primary (SQLite content column); document deduplication on upload
- T61-T72 regression tests added; 330 tests total

title: DB-primary storage, memory toggle, doc dedup
notes:
- Notes content stored in SQLite DB (content column in notes_index); file fallback preserved for backward compat. Calendar fully DB-primary, no more JSON dual-write.
- Document deduplication: same-hash upload detected, user can replace old doc or keep both. doc_replace/doc_keep_both callbacks added.
- Per-user memory toggle in profile (memory_enabled pref in user_prefs table). Admin > Memory Settings page to configure short/mid/long-term memory parameters (CONVERSATION_HISTORY_MAX, CONV_SUMMARY_THRESHOLD, CONV_MID_MAX) stored in system_settings table.
- T61-T65 regression tests added.

title: LLM context trace debug tool
notes:
- Admin > LLM Settings > Context Trace: shows last 5 LLM calls with provider/model/temperature/history/RAG breakdown
- Extended llm_calls DB table: logs model, temperature, system_chars, history_chars, rag_chunks, response_preview, context_snapshot per call
- Voice pipeline now logs to llm_calls (was missing)
- Root cause analysis of 1837 context contamination bug documented
- _rag_debug_stats() helper for RAG context size stats
- T60 regression test (12 checks) for LLM trace tool
- T39 updated: voice must use ask_llm_with_history (not bare ask_llm)

title: Voice pipeline conversation context memory fix
notes:
- Fix: voice messages now use full conversation history (ask_llm_with_history) — was stateless single-turn before
- Voice LLM call now includes: system message (security + bot config + long-term memory), prior conversation turns, and current user turn with RAG context
- Both user (clean STT text) and assistant turns saved to conversation history
- Add _voice_user_turn_content() in bot_access.py to properly split STT hint from system context
- T59 regression test: 6 checks covering history-aware voice pipeline

title: RAG pipeline fixes and admin LLM temperature control
notes:
- Fix: store.log_rag_activity() was never called — RAG log was always empty; now called after every FTS retrieval
- Fix: FTS search now enforced with rag_timeout via concurrent.futures (no more silent hangs)
- Feature: LLM temperature configurable at runtime via Admin > RAG Settings (range 0.0-2.0)
- Feature: _effective_temperature() in bot_llm.py reads runtime setting, falls back to LOCAL_TEMPERATURE
- Feature: MAX_DOC_SIZE_MB=20 constant; upload rejects oversized files with user-visible error
- Improvement: docs_restrictions_info now shows max file size (20 MB) in all 3 languages
- Test: T58 regression test (8 checks) for all §4 RAG pipeline fixes
- Docs: 3 Mermaid architecture diagrams added to doc/architecture/stacks.md

title: Multi-turn context and system message fix
notes:
- Fix: Ollama ask_llm_with_history now sends native messages array (was falling to single-turn fallback)
- Fix: role:system message now prepended to every multi-turn call (bot identity + memory note for LLM)
- Fix: Security preamble and bot config no longer stuffed into last user message only
- Add: _build_system_message() and _user_turn_content() helper functions in bot_access.py
- Test: T56 regression test for ollama native history
- Test: T57 regression test for system message architecture

title: Tiered memory, document admin, RAG settings
notes:
- Tiered conversation memory: mid/long-term summaries via LLM
- Document detail view: rename, share toggle, upload stats, hash dedup
- RAG admin settings: configurable Top-K, chunk size, timeout
- Profile: clear memory button clears all tiers
- Docs menu: restrictions info + detail view for each document

title: Fix hardcoded strings + i18n cleanup
notes:
- Move cal_event_saved_prefix, voice_note_msg, audio_interrupted from hardcoded Python to strings.json
- T55 regression test: no hardcoded user-visible strings in Python source
- Update key count references (188 -> 328)

title: Notes enhancements, DB reads, Documents RAG context
notes:
- §22 Notes: delete confirmation dialog before deleting
- §22 Notes: rename title (new Rename button in edit menu)
- §22 Notes: download single note as .md or all notes as ZIP
- §22 Notes: after edit/append show note immediately (no return to menu)
- §9.1 Notes: list reads from DB index (store.list_notes) with file fallback
- §9.1 Notes: save uses direct DB upsert (no double-write bug)
- §10 RAG: user document chunks injected as [KNOWLEDGE] block in all chat prompts
- §10 RAG: FTS5 search runs per-request when user has uploaded documents
- update_from_git.sh: package subdir support (core/ telegram/ features/ etc.)
- setup_voice_openclaw.sh: faster-whisper default model base to small

title: FasterWhisper startup preload and HF offline mode
notes:
- FasterWhisper model now preloaded at bot startup in background thread (eliminates 0.3-1s cold-load on first voice message)
- HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 set automatically when local HuggingFace cache exists (prevents network check on every model load)
- Voice benchmark diagnostics: identified restart-induced cache eviction as root cause of slow voice after deploy

title: Ollama GPU acceleration (AMD Radeon 890M)
notes:
- Ollama now runs on AMD Radeon 890M GPU via ROCm on SintAItion (gfx1150, 41/41 layers offloaded)
- _ask_ollama switched to native /api/chat endpoint with think:false (fixes empty responses with qwen3 models)
- OLLAMA_MIN_TIMEOUT=90s prevents false timeouts during GPU model load
- OLLAMA_THINK=false by default suppresses extended thinking tokens
- qwen2:0.5b: 256ms on GPU (was 14s CPU); qwen3:14b: ~1.2s with think:false

title: Fix All Notes hang — BUTTON_DATA_INVALID
notes:
- Replace raw Cyrillic slugs in note callback_data with 12-char SHA1 hash IDs
- Cyrillic slugs can be 2 bytes/char and exceeded Telegram 64-byte callback_data limit
- Hash→slug cache with filesystem fallback on bot restart
- Fix _slug() byte-based truncation (was char-based, 60 chars = 120 bytes for Cyrillic)
- Affected: All Notes list, note open/edit/delete/raw/append/replace actions

title: System chat: echo answers, localized confirm, echo allowlist
notes:
- Knowledge questions answered directly (echo pattern) without Run/Cancel dialog
- Localize confirm message: system_cmd_confirm key in ru/en/de
- Add echo to security allowlist so knowledge answers are not blocked
- system_prompt: POSIX rules + language + knowledge vs shell distinction

title: Voice opts menu fix + system chat prompt fix
notes:
- Add faster_whisper_stt toggle to voice opts menu (OpenClaw)
- Hide Pi-only opts (whisper.cpp, vosk_fallback, tmpfs) on OpenClaw
- Fix LLM menu: no crash on missing config.json (OpenClaw)
- Fix system chat prompt: respond in user language, POSIX syntax, knowledge vs shell

title: Fix web TTS hardcoded Piper path
notes:
- Fix web UI TTS endpoint using hardcoded /usr/local/bin/piper instead of PIPER_BIN config
- Affects all 4 TTS call sites in bot_web.py
- Web TTS now works on TariStation2 and SintAItion

title: Clean chat welcome + admin pipeline diagnostics
notes:
- Removed Vosk/Piper tech references from chat and voice welcome messages for all users
- Admin users receive a separate pipeline info message after each voice request (STT provider/model, LLM provider/model, TTS model, per-step timings)

title: System Chat moved to Admin menu
notes:
- System Chat removed from main menu (was visible to admins only)
- System Chat now exclusively accessible via Admin Panel → System Chat
- Cleaner main menu for all users

title: Fix STT Vosk error on OpenClaw platform
notes:

- faster-whisper: retry without VAD filter when first pass returns empty (fixes short voice messages)
- Import DEVICE_VARIANT in bot_voice.py for platform-aware fallback logic

title: Mobile Web UI optimization
notes:

- Voice recording stop fixed on iOS Safari (MediaRecorder.onstop fallback)

title: Merge Taris-UI-POC features: Screen DSL + RAG + admin i18n fixes
changes: cherry-pick 333f210: Admin menu i18n fix (all labels localized), System Chat moved to admin panel, chat.html send button fix
cherry-pick 606ec57+7a48543+3628079: Screen DSL Loader (screen_loader.py) with variant support, YAML screens for notes/profile/help/menus
cherry-pick a39a368: FTS5 RAG knowledge base + document upload/search/delete pipeline
RAG constants added: RAG_ENABLED, RAG_TOP_K, RAG_CHUNK_SIZE, RAG_FLAG_FILE
Keep all OpenClaw-specific fixes: variant support, DEVICE_VARIANT, password reset, voice debug, unified user list

title: Fix voice mode ignoring user role in system chat
changes: bot_voice.py: voice pipeline now checks _cur_mode == 'system' and dispatches to _handle_system_message() (admin-only, role-aware), same as the text handler
Previously voice in system chat fell through to generic ask_llm() with the standard security preamble that refuses system commands — admin was effectively treated as a regular user in voice mode

title: Fix LLM quality + TTS language mismatch
changes: bot.env: LLM_PROVIDER=openai (gpt-4o-mini) — qwen2:0.5b was too small and hallucinating
bot.env: LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER=ollama (local offline fallback when OpenAI unreachable)
bot.env: FASTER_WHISPER_MODEL=small (was 'base' — small is 4x larger, much better Russian accuracy)
bot_voice.py: _voice_lang() helper — TTS now uses STT_LANG (configured speech language) instead of Telegram client UI language, fixing English TTS on Russian voice sessions

title: Fix menu/keyboard silent loss due to Markdown parse failure
changes: bot_instance.py: TeleBot default parse_mode changed from Markdown to None — prevents silent send failure when LLM/user content contains underscores or asterisks
bot_handlers.py: LLM chat response edit/send now use parse_mode=None; note body send uses parse_mode=None
bot_voice.py: voice fallback LLM response send uses parse_mode=None

title: Fix 409 polling conflict on restart; add STT INFO logging
changes: bot_instance.py: 409 ExceptionHandler — sleeps 35 s when Telegram reports Conflict (old long-poll still alive after rapid restart)
bot_voice.py: promote STT log entries from DEBUG to INFO — provider, language, and transcript are now visible in journal

title: Fix STT language: use STT_LANG config, not Telegram client language
changes: bot_voice.py: STT uses STT_LANG from bot_config (default ru) — Telegram client language_code no longer overrides STT
bot_voice.py: Vosk fallback also uses STT_LANG (was using _lang(chat_id) = en for EN-client users)
bot.env: added STT_LANG=ru
registrations.json: persisted lang=ru for admin user
Root cause: _set_lang() used Telegram language_code=en from client, causing RU audio to transcribe as EN

title: Fix voice LLM routing + Whisper hallucination guard
changes: bot_voice.py: replace _ask_taris() with ask_llm() — voice now respects LLM_PROVIDER/fallback chain
bot_voice.py: add Whisper hallucination guard rejecting known false-positive phrases
Fixes: Telegram voice replies failing with 'picoclaw: No such file or directory'

title: Username change + Telegram-Web unified account linking
changes: Profile page: Change Username form (validates uniqueness, re-issues JWT)
Profile page: Link Telegram section with 6-char code entry
POST /profile/change-username: validates format, checks uniqueness, re-signs JWT
POST /profile/link-telegram: consumes bot_state link code, merges accounts
/link command in Telegram bot (calls _handle_web_link, same as menu button)

bot_config.py: SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, SMTP_FROM, ADMIN_EMAIL constants

title: Fix: web UI hang during voice/LLM — async event loop unblocked
changes: Root cause: ask_llm() + subprocess.run() in async FastAPI endpoints blocked entire event loop
Fix: all blocking calls wrapped with asyncio.to_thread() in 7 endpoints:
voice_chat_endpoint: ffmpeg decode, STT, LLM (90s), TTS piper+ffmpeg
voice_transcribe_endpoint: ffmpeg decode, STT
voice_tts_endpoint: piper + ffmpeg
voice_chat_text_endpoint: ask_llm, piper + ffmpeg
chat_send: ask_llm_with_history
calendar_parse_text: _cal_parse_events_from_text (via to_thread)
calendar_console_route: ask_llm intent classifier
Server now handles concurrent requests during voice/LLM processing

qwen2:0.5b model downloaded to ~/.local/ollama-models
LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER=openai configured: Ollama primary, OpenAI gpt-4o-mini fallback
OPENAI_BASE_URL switched to api.openai.com (OpenAI direct key)
Full LLM chain verified: Ollama OK + OpenAI fallback OK

VOICE_DEBUG_MODE / VOICE_DEBUG_DIR constants in bot_config.py
voice_chat_endpoint + voice_transcribe_endpoint: wired VoiceDebugSession; return debug_session_id in JSON
GET /voice/debug/sessions — list recent debug sessions (auth required)
GET /voice/debug/{session_id}/{filename} — download any debug file; path traversal blocked
voice.html: download button (📥) next to every TTS audio player; links to debug endpoint or blob URL
LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER constant (mirrors STT_FALLBACK_PROVIDER): named provider fallback chain
_ask_with_fallback(): primary -> named fallback -> legacy local llama.cpp fallback
ask_llm() + ask_llm_or_raise() refactored to use _ask_with_fallback()

Slovenian (sl) added to lang_map for all STT providers

title: No-history emergency fallback + model switch to gemma-3-4b-it:free
notes:
- ask_llm_with_history now falls back to ask_llm (no history) if all retries exhausted
- Prevents silent empty response when rate-limited model fails after 3 attempts
- active_model switched to google/gemma-3-4b-it:free

title: LLM HTTP 429 retry backoff + model switch
notes:
- _http_post_json now retries up to 2 times on HTTP 429 with 5s/10s backoff
- Respects Retry-After header from OpenRouter
- Default OpenRouter model switched to meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free for better free-tier availability

title: System Chat LLM error handling improvements
notes:
- System Chat now shows specific error messages for 402/401/429/503/timeout/missing binary
- Empty LLM response now shows actionable message instead of silent failure
- Calendar console docstring update

title: Switch to free OpenRouter model; enhanced LLM error logging
notes:
- OPENAI_MODEL changed to google/gemma-3-4b-it:free (working free OpenRouter model)
- _ask_openai now catches HTTPError explicitly and logs HTTP status + response body (up to 300 chars)
- Fixes 402 Payment Required on every LLM call caused by auto model picking paid models with no credits

title: Fix raw HTTP 402 error leaked through taris rc=0 stdout path
notes:
- Added _raise_if_http_error() helper in bot_llm.py
- _ask_taris now detects HTTP error patterns in stdout even when taris exits rc=0
- Also improves rc!=0 path: error text parsed for 402/429/401/503 patterns; full text included in RuntimeError message
- System Chat and exception handler in bot_handlers.py correctly intercepts all these errors with user-friendly messages

title: System Chat HTTP error handling + LLM fallback on 402/429/503
notes:
- ask_llm_or_raise() now tries local llama.cpp fallback before raising (Feature 3.2)
- System Chat shows user-friendly messages for HTTP 402/401/429/503 errors
- Raw urllib.error.HTTPError strings no longer shown to users

title: System Chat error messages fix + T26 regression guard
notes:
- Fixed _SPINNER_RE stripping ASCII hyphen from bash commands (ls -la, df -h, etc.)
- Added ask_llm_or_raise() to bot_llm.py for strict LLM failure handling
- System Chat now shows specific error: timeout / binary not found / LLM error text

title: Fix System Chat LLM routing
notes:
- Fixed: System Chat returned 'Could not generate a command' for any input — it was calling the taris CLI binary directly instead of routing through the configured LLM_PROVIDER (openai/OpenRouter)
- System Chat now uses ask_llm() like all other LLM-powered features, so the active provider and model are respected

title: Fix LLM model selection, update OpenAI catalog
notes:
- Fixed: selecting an OpenAI/OpenRouter model via Admin LLM menu now actually takes effect (was always using OPENAI_MODEL env var)
- Fixed: model selection checkmark (is_current) now correctly compares against full model ID (e.g. openai/gpt-4.1)
- Fixed: callback_data now sends full OpenRouter model slug (openai/gpt-4.1) instead of short name
- Updated OpenAI catalog: added gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano, o3, o4-mini; removed deprecated gpt-4.5-preview

title: Fix LLM provider (OpenRouter direct), voice mode routing, import error
notes:
- Fixed: LLM calls failed with taris rc=1 because taris-gateway service crash-loops (Error: no channels enabled) — switched to LLM_PROVIDER=openai pointing at OpenRouter's OpenAI-compatible endpoint
- Fixed: voice messages during contact_add / contact_edit / contact_search modes were silently handed to LLM instead of the contact handler — STT transcript was discarded, contact was never saved
- Fixed: voice messages during cal_edit_title / cal_edit_dt / cal_edit_remind modes were also ignored — calendar field edits via voice now work
- Fixed: NameError ACTIVE_MODEL_FILE not defined in bot_admin.py — constant was used in _set_active_model() but missing from the import block

title: Fix empty-note crashes; /status shows LLM provider
notes:
- Fixed: opening, editing, appending, or replacing an empty note crashed with ApiTelegramException: Bad Request: message text is empty
- Root cause: _handle_note_raw and _start_note_edit/append/replace used text/lines[0] without guarding for empty string
- Fix: note display falls back to localized note_empty_body string; lines[0] access guarded with if lines else ''
- /status command now shows LLM_PROVIDER prefix before active model name (e.g. taris > gpt-4o-mini)

title: Fix calendar: Russian time idioms and partial ISO dt
notes:
- Fixed: Add Event returned 'Could not parse date' for Russian shorthand like 'Тренировка в 19'
- Root cause 1: event_parse prompt had no rules for 'в X' (at X o'clock) or time-of-day words (утром/вечером)
- Root cause 2: LLMs sometimes return partial ISO 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH' instead of 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM' — fromisoformat() fails on Python <3.11
- Fix 1: added prompt rules — 'в X' = X:00, утром=09:00, днём=13:00, вечером=19:00, в полдень=12:00
- Fix 2: defensive dt_str normalization in _finish_cal_add() pads 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH' to 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:00'

title: Fix free chat: taris 402 error leaked as reply
notes:
- Fixed: free chat showed raw taris error log (HTTP 402 / OpenRouter out of credits) as bot reply
- Root cause 1: _ask_taris() in bot_llm.py logged warning on rc!=0 but still returned cleaned output instead of raising
- Root cause 2: _LOG_PREFIX regex didn't match compact date format YYYYMMDD HH:MM:SS used by taris — log lines passed through cleanup unchanged
- Fix: raise RuntimeError on non-zero taris exit code — ask_llm() catches it, returns empty — user sees user-friendly error message
- Fix: extended _LOG_PREFIX regex to also match YYYYMMDD (no separator) date format

title: Fix calendar LLM call — use ask_llm
notes:
- Fixed: calendar NL input returned 'no LLM response' error
- Root cause: bot_calendar.py used old _ask_taris (bot_access) with short timeouts (20-30s) and outdated output cleaner missing agent|json pipe format
- Fix: migrated all 4 calendar LLM calls to ask_llm (bot_llm) with 60s timeout, proper error logging, and correct output cleaning

title: Prompt templates centralised + LLM params configurable
notes:
- All LLM prompts extracted to src/prompts.json
- New core/bot_prompts.py loader with fmt_prompt() helper
- LLM tuning params (temperature, max_tokens) configurable via env vars
- bot_config.py: YANDEXGPT_TEMPERATURE, YANDEXGPT_MAX_TOKENS, ANTHROPIC_MAX_TOKENS, LOCAL_MAX_TOKENS, LOCAL_TEMPERATURE

title: Fix Telegram-Web account link codes
notes:
- Fixed HTTP 500 on /register when entering a Telegram link code
- Root cause: link codes were stored per-process in memory; web service never saw codes generated by Telegram service
- Fix: codes now persisted to ~/.taris/web_link_codes.json, shared between both services

title: RAG knowledge base, Dev menu, voice debug, LLM fallback
notes:
- RAG pipeline: document upload (PDF/TXT), chunking, embedding (MiniLM), FTS5+vector hybrid retrieval, admin RAG settings, query log
- Dev menu: admin-only developer panel with LLM trace, system info, RAG stats, benchmark trigger
- Voice debug mode: per-session audio capture (7 stages), downloadable debug bundles from Web UI
- LLM named fallback: LLM_FALLBACK_PROVIDER env var; local Ollama fallback guard (LLM_LOCAL_FALLBACK)
- Per-user memory toggle in profile; admin Memory Settings page
- Notes/Calendar fully DB-primary (SQLite content column); document deduplication on upload
- T61-T72 regression tests added; 330 tests total

title: Bug fixes 0.7 and 0.8
notes:
- Bug 0.7: Contact add/edit cancel button was showing 'btn_cancel' instead of translated text — added missing btn_cancel i18n key to ru/en/de
- Bug 0.8: Profile change password failed with 'could not change password' — fixed account['id'] key error (correct key is 'user_id')

title: Contact Book (Feature 4.0)
notes:
- Add, view, edit and delete contacts via Telegram bot
- Search contacts by name, phone or email
- Web UI at /contacts with two-panel layout (search + list + form)
- 38 new i18n strings (ru/en/de)

title: System Chat role guards (Bug 0.6)
notes:
- Admin role limited to read-only commands (cat, ls, journalctl, systemctl status, etc.)
- New Developer role (DEVELOPER_USERS env var) allows service control and file writes
- Commands not on any allowlist are blocked before execution
- Confirm gate always required for all system commands
- _classify_cmd_class() added to bot_security; _is_developer() added to bot_access

title: Identity silo fix: unified Telegram+Web user identity
notes:
- Fixed: Telegram and Web now share a single user identity
- Web UUID and Telegram int chat_id unified under shared profile key
- Calendar, Notes, and Profile data now visible across both channels
- _resolve_storage_id() ensures consistent file-based storage resolution

title: Unified Chat+Voice mode
notes:
- Removed separate Voice Session button from main menu
- Free Chat now handles both text and voice messages in one mode
- Chat welcome message now shows voice availability (Russian only, Vosk + Piper TTS)
- Simplified menu: fewer buttons, same functionality

title: Calendar console voice fix
notes:
- Fixed: voice messages in calendar console mode were routed to general LLM instead of calendar handler
- Voice commands like 'add meeting at 9' now correctly add events via calendar console
- Bug 0.5: security preamble no longer blocks calendar add-event intent

title: Multilingual support: Russian, English, German (DE)
notes:
- German (de) language support added for all bot functions
- Language auto-detected from Telegram user language_code
- German TTS: Piper de_DE-thorsten-medium.onnx
- German STT: Vosk vosk-model-small-de
- All 115 UI strings translated to German
- Calendar, voice, notes, mail — all support German

title: Calendar: multi-event, NL query, delete confirmation, console mode
notes:
- Multi-event parsing: one message can add multiple events — each confirmed individually with Save / Skip / Save All
- NL query: ask "что у меня завтра?", "события на следующей неделе" — filtered results shown instantly
- Delete confirmation: calendar events now require confirmation before deletion
- Calendar console mode: free-form text commands (add/query/edit/delete) routed by LLM intent classification
- All calendar mutations require explicit user confirmation

title: System chat emoji fix + TTS chunk delivery fix + timing debug opt
notes:
- Fixed critical regex typo in system chat: emoji filter was also stripping letter F from all bash commands
- Hardened _extract_bash_cmd: bracket-wrapped emoji, prose sentence rejection, ASCII first-word check
- Defense-in-depth: command is re-sanitized immediately before bash -c execution
- System prompt now explicitly forbids emojis and decorative characters in LLM responses
- Fixed TTS multi-chunk labeling: chunk label now uses actual sent counter, not raw index - failed chunks no longer produce misleading (2/2) with missing (1/2)
- Added voice_timing_debug toggle to Voice Opts admin menu (previously only via VOICE_TIMING_DEBUG env var)

title: Send as email from Notes, Digest, and Calendar
notes:
- Notes, Mail Digest, and Calendar events now have a Send as email button
- First send: bot asks for recipient address and stores it per user
- Subsequent sends use the stored address (change option always available)
- Sends via SMTP over SSL using the configured mail App Password
- Supports Gmail, Yandex, Mail.ru, and custom IMAP/SMTP providers

title: Calendar: confirmation step + full event editing
notes:
- Confirmation card shown before saving a new event: review title, date/time and reminder offset
- From confirmation: edit title, date/time (re-parsed via LLM) or reminder minutes
- Event detail view: Edit title / Reschedule (new date/time) / Edit reminder
- Reminder timer is automatically rescheduled when an event is edited
- reminded flag reset on edit so the reminder fires again at the new time

title: Enhanced user registration: name input + full identity in admin
notes:
- New users are asked to enter their name before registration is submitted
- Admin approval notification shows Telegram first/last name, @username, and user-entered name
- All admin user panels (list, pending, remove) show full identity info for each user
- Approve/block confirmations include the user's entered name
- registrations.json now stores first_name and last_name alongside username and name

title: Notes UX: in-place edit, raw text view, read aloud
notes:
- Note edit: current content shown via ForceReply — edit directly in Telegram input bar without rewriting from scratch
- Raw text view: new Raw text button shows note body without Markdown rendering (useful for copying raw content)
- Read aloud: new Read aloud button synthesises note body via Piper TTS and sends as a voice message with note title as caption
- Voice input during note creation and edit flows is routed into the note state machine instead of going to the LLM
- Note open keyboard: Edit / Delete / Raw text / Read aloud / All Notes / Menu

title: §5.3 Voice pipeline improvements as optional toggles
notes:
- VAD pre-filter (webrtcvad): removes non-speech frames before Vosk — toggle: vad_prefilter
- Whisper STT (whisper.cpp): use tiny model instead of Vosk — toggle: whisper_stt (needs binary + model)
- Piper low model (ru_RU-irina-low.onnx): faster TTS synthesis — toggle: piper_low_model (needs model)
- Persistent Piper keepalive: holds ONNX in page cache between calls — toggle: persistent_piper
- All 4 opts default OFF — existing behaviour unchanged
- New opts visible in Admin → ⚡ Voice Opts menu

title: Notes System — create, list, edit, delete + voice dictation & read
notes:
- New 📝 Notes menu (Full + Admin roles) with Create / List / Open / Edit / Delete
- Notes stored as Markdown files in ~/.taris/notes/<chat_id>/
- Voice dictation: say "запиши заметку …" / "create note …" to save a voice note
- Voice read: say "прочитай заметку …" / "read note …" to hear a note via TTS
- All notes UI localised in Russian and English via strings.json

title: Fix admin menu Markdown parse failures (5 handlers)
notes:
- Voice Opts menu: escape status strings containing underscores (e.g. warm_piper) — was silently failing
- Switch LLM confirm: removed parse_mode=Markdown with italic markers — was crashing silently
- LLM menu + OpenAI sub-menu: plain-text output + try/except on all send calls
- Pending Requests: escape user-supplied username/name through _escape_md() — any _ in a username broke the entire menu
- All 5 admin handlers now have try/except with plain-text fallback

title: Fix: Release Notes button in admin changelog menu
notes:
- _handle_admin_changelog: added try/except around Markdown send + plain-text fallback
- Previously: button press triggered a Markdown parse exception that was swallowed — button appeared to do nothing
- Admin → Changelog now reliably shows the full version history

title: RC1 — User Registration Workflow + Full Feature Overview
notes:
🎉 Release Candidate 1 — first officially tagged release.

NEW in this version (TODO §1.1 — User Registration Workflow):
- Unknown users who send /start now enter a registration flow
- Registration stored in registrations.json: pending / approved / blocked
- Admins receive inline-button notification for every new request
- Approve → user added as guest and notified immediately
- Block → user marked blocked with polite decline message
- Admin panel: new Pending Requests button with live count badge
- Blocked users see declined message on /start; pending users see waiting message

All available features:
- Gmail digest (inbox + spam, last 24h, LLM-summarised)
- Free Chat via taris agent
- System Chat: describe task, LLM generates bash command, confirm and run
- Voice Session: Telegram voice note → Vosk STT → taris LLM → Piper TTS
- LLM switcher: OpenRouter (default), OpenAI GPT-4o/mini/o3-mini/o1/gpt-4.5
- Voice pipeline opts: silence strip, 8kHz STT, warm Piper, parallel TTS, Piper ONNX in RAM
- Auto-detect question language (Cyrillic=Russian, Latin=English)
- Role system: Admin / Full / Guest with role-specific menus
- /status: per-service status, active LLM, user role
- Admin deploy notifications on every version bump
- Orphaned TTS message cleanup on restart
- User Registration Workflow (this version)

Git commits in this RC:
663a133 feat: User Registration Workflow (v2026.3.15-rc1)
61fd8c4 Restructure TODO.md
4e5c71b v2026.3.14 — Piper ONNX in RAM (tmpfs_model)
a448a4c v2026.3.12 — Fix stuck Generating audio
3a545de v2026.3.11 — TTS_MAX_CHARS 200-600
21832a2 v2026.3.10 — Auto-detect question language
4064a85 v2026.3.9  — Fix taris output
5fc4336 v2026.3.8  — Language enforcement + TTS emoji fix
a74a27b v2026.3.7  — Release notes system
4d20006             Voice pipeline optimizations
e53bf78 v2026.3.6  — OpenAI ChatGPT sub-menu
7c836a7             /status service diagnostics
3c505fd             Role-based help variants

Tag: v2026.3.15-rc1

title: Voice opt: Piper model in RAM (tmpfs)
notes:
- New voice opt: 'Piper model in RAM (/dev/shm)'
- Copies 66 MB Piper ONNX model to /dev/shm/piper/ on enable
- TTS and warm-up use RAM path (~10x faster reads vs microSD)
- Auto-restores RAM copy on bot restart if opt is enabled
- Background copy with status message; auto-disables on copy failure

title: Improve STT: audio enhancement + confidence filtering
notes:
- ffmpeg: always apply highpass=f=80 + dynaudnorm=p=0.9 before Vosk (removes noise, normalizes volume)
- Vosk confidence: words below 65% marked as [?word] in transcript
- LLM instructed to silently correct low-confidence words from context

title: Fix stuck 'Generating audio' on restart
notes:
- Persistent pending-TTS tracker: orphaned status messages cleaned on next startup
- try/finally around TTS block: message always edited/deleted even on exception
- join timeout fixed: 130s → 160s (piper 120s + ffmpeg 30s + margin)
- Release notes notification: plain-text fallback + title Markdown escaping

title: Increase TTS audio length (200 → 600 chars)
notes:
- TTS_MAX_CHARS raised from 200 to 600 (~25 words → ~75 words, ~7 s → ~25 s audio)
- Constant promoted to top-level config
- LLM prompt updated to allow 3-6 sentences (was 2-4)

title: Auto-detect question language for replies
notes:
- Reply language now follows: question lang > Telegram lang > Russian (default) > English (backup)
- Cyrillic-heavy text → reply in Russian; Latin-heavy → reply in English
- Default language changed to Russian (was English)
- Only supported languages (ru/en) are used for LLM replies

title: Fix taris bash-lc command leaking to user
notes:
- Strip "Taris:" header line from taris output
- Extract text from bash -lc 'printf "..."' wrapper (taris agent format)
- Users no longer see raw shell commands in voice/chat responses

title: Language enforcement + TTS emoji fix + Markdown safety
notes:
- All LLM responses forced to the user's language (Russian/English prefix injected into every prompt)
- Emoji and Unicode pictographs stripped from TTS input — Piper no longer reads "Омар" or similar at the start of voice replies
- Literal \\n in LLM output is now correctly unescaped to a newline before display
- Voice reply text uses Markdown escaping with plain-text fallback to prevent parse errors

title: Voice Pipeline Optimizations
notes:
5 optional voice latency optimizations added (all OFF by default).

Enable via Admin → ⚡ Voice Opts:
• *Silence strip* — crops silence before STT (−6s)
• *8 kHz sample rate* — lighter Vosk processing (−7s)
• *Warm Piper cache* — pre-loads TTS model at startup (−15s first call)
• *Parallel TTS thread* — TTS starts while text reply is sent (text-first UX)
• *Per-user audio toggle* — 🔇/🔊 button on every voice reply

Settings persist in `~/.taris/voice_opts.json`.

title: OpenAI ChatGPT LLM Sub-menu + TTS Timeout Fix
notes:
OpenAI ChatGPT model selector with API key management.
Available models: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, o3-mini, o1, gpt-4.5-preview.
API key saved once for all 5 models via Admin → Switch LLM → OpenAI ChatGPT.

Fixed audio timeout: Markdown stripped before TTS, char limit halved (200), timeout raised to 120s.

title: Role-based Help + /status Service Diagnostics
notes:
Three help variants: Admin / Full / Guest — each shows only relevant menu items and role badge.

/status now shows per-service status with icons (✅/❌): Telegram Bot, AI Gateway, Voice Assistant, plus active LLM model and user role.

title: i18n Infrastructure + Voice Language Announcement
notes:
Full Russian/English localisation via strings.json.
All UI strings externalised — no hard-coded text in bot code.
Voice session intro announces supported language (Vosk + Piper Irina).
LLM switcher in admin panel — persist model choice to active_model.txt.
